<!-- source-snippet repo="splice" path="docs/src/sv_operator/sv_helm.rst" commit="889595d950391fec6acb767c4750ab37bd189a4b" snippet="splice-rst-code-docs-src-sv-operator-sv-helm-yaml-882" location="lines:882-892" -->
```yaml
apiVersion: cert-manager.io/v1
kind: Certificate
metadata:
   name: cn-certificate
   namespace: cluster-ingress
spec:
    dnsNames:
    - '*.sv.YOUR_HOSTNAME'
    issuerRef:
        name: letsencrypt-production
    secretName: cn-net-tls
```
